info.name: Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Management Intune Data Warehouse API

description.content:
OData-based REST API that provides access to Intune reporting data in a machine-readable format. Enables building custom reports and analytics for enterprise mobile environment insights. Uses OData v4.0 protocol with standard patterns for request/response headers, status codes, HTTP methods, URL conventions, and query options. Data is sampled daily to provide a historical view of the mobile device environment.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Intune Support
